title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Zoro, Kid, Unknown person #10, Toko, Orochi as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wide open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Uwagh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Get a clue, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You fool! Our duel is-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yes, I'll get to it! Hang on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Looks like we got another weirdo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFA-FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFA!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You! You're zorojuro, the Criminal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you come to the aid of this woman and child?

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Flower capital wanted man KAMA20 the Killer

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Woman! Why do you protect this child?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am here only for that laughing fool of a girl!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I have come to claim her life!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Laughing Fool? Kyahahahahahahahahahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KAMAZO THE KILLER! You cut down many a person in the capital,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it seems you're actually an assassin of Orochi's that's masquerading as a killer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one else in this world could possibly want O-TOKO dead.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: You call the Shogun by name?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who in the world are you?! FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAF

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Samurai! Please, save us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will thank you in whatever way I can.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I'm not about to let a woman and child get killed in front of me, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd not say no to some food and sake.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You've got a deal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It matters not! I have been told to kill

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: All who stand in my way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KILLIN' SOMEONE WITH A BOSS USUALLY MEANS TROUBLE DOWN THE ROAD, BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Do not worry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will be the one to die here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This guy's pretty strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So you've decided to become serious, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Flutter flutter

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 34 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
